text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... (That frilly skirt on display is so cute.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(But there's no way something like that would
look good on me.)

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text: Hello! Feel free to try it on if you like!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... They were just trying to help me out, and I
ran away like a coward!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Guess I'll just go home and work out.
